methodology.title: Curated source-first AI intelligence brief
methodology.summary: This is a placeholder dataset. Run the GitHub Action or `npm run build:data` in a network-enabled environment to generate live AI updates.
caveats: Live data is not bundled in this local placeholder file.
Each item in production is linked back to its original source URL.
Categorization is heuristic and intended for triage.

research.title: Waiting for live research feed
research.summary: The scheduled workflow will ingest recent arXiv submissions and attach source URLs, authors, and timestamps.

news.title: Waiting for live news feed
news.summary: The scheduled workflow will collect recent AI news entries from configured RSS sources and preserve their publication timestamps.

threads.title: Waiting for live Threads feed
threads.summary: Threads coverage is fetched through RSSHub-compatible adapters. If a configured profile does not expose a route, the site will show the source error transparently.
